column1: "Nobody can help me now" she said_________ . (SAD)
She looked at us_________________and didn't say anything. (SAD)
This is my room. And that's__________. He is a friend of_______ . (ANDREW/I)
The sportsmen's____________were waiting for us at the cafe. (WIFE)
Shall I open the book at Page___________ ?(THREE)
Have you met a tall boy with long__________ ? (HAIR)
